features: Unisex Cologne: Experience the allure of our Patchouli Cologne, a blend of exotic spices and velvety notes. Crafted for the modern bohemian, it evokes an air of mystery and sophistication, perfect for those seeking an exquisite aftershave scent.
Exotic Notes: Delight in the harmonious fusion of cardamom, nutmeg, and black pepper, balanced with the warmth of ylang-ylang and suede. Ideal for those in search of a unique people's perfume.

How to Use: A single spritz on the neck, inner elbow, and wrist suffices to envelop you in a subtle yet lingering fragrance throughout the day, boosting your confidence with its alluring pheromones infused scent.

Perfect Gift for Him and Her: Elevate his style with the gift of our Patchouli Cologne. Ideal for the discerning anyone who appreciates luxury and sophistication, it's a timeless experience and a coveted addition to any collection of fragrances lover.

Legacy of Murdock London: Since our inception, Murdock London has epitomized British elegance and craftsmanship. With a commitment to quality and innovation, we continue to redefine standards for the modern people.
description: Directions Apply a small amount to pulse points (wrists, neck, and elbows). Avoid the neck area to prevent staining clothes. Reapply as needed for longevity.
